search_manifest.seed_order: 1-byte seeds first, then 2-byte seeds, each bucket big-endian
search_manifest.match_rule: generated seed prefixes are compared directly against token-transformed bytes
search_manifest.metadata_policy: dictionary, separators, unknown tokens, and row structure are charged before promotion
search_manifest.scope: token/dictionary transform research artifact only; not .tlmr format support

transforms.name: token-preserve-top32
transforms.description: Replace repeated lexemes with marker+dictionary-id while preserving separators in stream.

transforms.name: token-preserve-top64
transforms.description: Replace repeated lexemes with marker+dictionary-id while preserving separators in stream.

transforms.name: token-preserve-top128
transforms.description: Replace repeated lexemes with marker+dictionary-id while preserving separators in stream.

transforms.name: token-stream-top32
transforms.description: Emit only dictionary token ids in token order; separators and unknown tokens are charged as metadata.

transforms.name: token-stream-top64
transforms.description: Emit only dictionary token ids in token order; separators and unknown tokens are charged as metadata.

transforms.name: token-stream-top128
transforms.description: Emit only dictionary token ids in token order; separators and unknown tokens are charged as metadata.

transforms.name: token-column-stream-top32
transforms.description: Emit dictionary token ids column-major by line token position; row structure is charged as metadata.

transforms.name: token-column-stream-top64
transforms.description: Emit dictionary token ids column-major by line token position; row structure is charged as metadata.

summary.conclusion: Token dictionary transforms did not produce exact seed-span rows.
